info.name: Jalan Saluran Ruang Lingkup Module
info.description: API collection for Jalan Saluran Ruang Lingkup (Road Drainage Scope) module - Master data for drainage scope descriptions by proposal type

item.name: Query Endpoints
Get All Jalan Saluran Ruang Lingkup (with pagination)

request.description:
Get all jalan saluran ruang lingkup with optional pagination.

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "JalanSaluranRuangLingkup list retrieved successfully",
  "data": {
    "data": [
      {
        "id": 1,
        "id_jenis_usulan": 1,
        "deskripsi_ruang_lingkup": "Saluran drainase sisi kiri dan kanan jalan",
        "createdAt": "...",
        "updatedAt": "..."
      }
    ],
    "page": 1,
    "amount": 10,
    "total": 5,
    "totalPages": 1
  }
}
```

item.name: Get Jalan Saluran Ruang Lingkup by ID

request.description:
Get single jalan saluran ruang lingkup by ID.

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "JalanSaluranRuangLingkup retrieved successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "id_jenis_usulan": 1,
    "deskripsi_ruang_lingkup": "Saluran drainase sisi kiri dan kanan jalan",
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

item.description: Read endpoints accessible by all roles

item.name: CRUD Endpoints (ADMIN, SUPERADMIN)

request.description:
Create new jalan saluran ruang lingkup entry.

**Roles**: ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Body**:
```json
{
  "id_jenis_usulan": number,        // Required - Road proposal type ID
  "deskripsi_ruang_lingkup": string  // Required - Drainage scope description
}
```

**Common Descriptions**:
- "Saluran drainase sisi kiri dan kanan jalan" (Left and right side drainage)
- "Saluran drainase tengah jalan" (Center drainage)
- "Saluran drainase kombinasi" (Combined drainage)
- "Saluran drainase dengan gorong-gorong" (Drainage with culverts)

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 201,
  "message": "JalanSaluranRuangLingkup created successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "id_jenis_usulan": 1,
    "deskripsi_ruang_lingkup": "Saluran drainase sisi kiri dan kanan jalan",
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

Update existing jalan saluran ruang lingkup.

**Roles**: ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Body**:
```json
{
  "id": number,                     // Required - ID to update
  "id_jenis_usulan": number,        // Optional - Road proposal type ID
  "deskripsi_ruang_lingkup": string  // Optional - Drainage scope description
}
```

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "JalanSaluranRuangLingkup updated successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "id_jenis_usulan": 1,
    "deskripsi_ruang_lingkup": "Saluran drainase sisi kiri dan kanan jalan (Updated)",
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

Delete jalan saluran ruang lingkup by ID.

**Roles**: ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "JalanSaluranRuangLingkup deleted successfully"
}
```

item.description: Create, Update, Delete operations - Accessible by ADMIN and SUPERADMIN
